repo.description: Embedded systems memory management library. Implementations for malloc(), free(), and other useful memory management functions

terms.context_snippet: Embedded Artistry's `libmemory` is a memory management library for embedded systems. If you have a bare metal system and want to use `malloc()`, this library is for you!
